prompt: [Subject] Adult East Asian female around 22 years old, Urban pedestrian bridge at night, boyfriend's perspective smartphone night portrait snapshot. [Core Pose] - Woman standing near the bridge railing, waiting quietly at a meeting spot. - Naturally looks up upon noticing her boyfriend's arrival, showing a relieved, happy but not exaggerated smile. - One hand reaches out toward the camera, as if saying 'come over here' or 'let's hold hands'. - The hand is closer to the camera, appearing slightly larger due to wide-angle perspective, with fingertips slightly soft-focused. - Shoulders relaxed, natural standing posture, not forced, no emphasis on body curves. - Gentle and intimate expression, showing ease only to someone familiar. - Dark brown to black medium-length hair, with slightly messy strands and bangs due to night wind and humidity. [Environment] Urban footbridge at night, retaining structural details like railings, tiled floors, streetlights, high-rise buildings, blue glowing structures, distant roads, car lights, and trees. Background has realistic urban night shadow noise and light layers. [Clothing/Details] White or light-colored sleeveless knit top, black long skirt or loose trousers, casual dating style. Small necklace, low-key earrings, black shoulder bag. [Composition] 3:4 vertical. Woman slightly below center. Layers: reaching hand → natural smile and soft eyes → bridge railing → night road and skyscraper lights. Tilted composition like a quick phone snap. [Camera] Real smartphone night snapshot texture, boyfriend's POV, close-up, ~24mm wide-angle, slightly below eye level. Mobile HDR, face focused, slight night noise, motion blur, social media compression. [Atmosphere] Warm overhead streetlights mixed with building lights and blue reflections. Realistic highlights and slight overexposure on cheeks/nose due to HDR. [Style] Japanese urban night portrait, social media style, natural and intimate.
